visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short dark brown hair and a slight smile stands center-frame, looking directly into the lens while speaking. He is dressed in a creamy off-white long-sleeve sweatshirt that features a distinctive diagonal seam across the chest and a small black lapel microphone attached to the neckline. He keeps his hands clasped together in front of him. The setting is a brightly lit indoor corridor with a large wall of windows to his left, framed by vertical wooden slats. Outside the windows, a townscape with distant, snow-capped mountains under a clear sky is visible. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame. (2) The scene cuts to a medium shot of a woman with long brown hair and straight bangs sitting on a wooden bench. She wears a black utility-style jacket over a white shirt with a grey leafy pattern. She looks towards the camera with a serious and attentive facial expression. The background remains the same windowed hallway, with natural light pouring in from the side. White subtitles continue to display at the bottom. (3) The shot changes to show both individuals; the man stands on the right while the woman remains seated on the left. Simultaneously, they both bow their heads deeply in a traditional gesture of gratitude or apology, then slowly raise their heads to look back at the camera. The background environment is consistent with the previous phases, showing the sunlit wooden-framed windows.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 為了節省大家的時間. (2) [Subtitle]: 有關今天凌晨+O發表的聲明影片. (3) [Subtitle]: 幫大家統整的. (4) [Subtitle]: +O聲明影片重點懶人包如下. (5) [Subtitle]: 謝謝大家.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker delivers a concise introduction in Mandarin with a clear, professional, and slightly warm tone. The speech rate is even and calm. In the background, a somber, melancholic piano melody plays softly, maintaining a steady, slow tempo. The acoustic environment is very clean, with only a faint, nearly imperceptible indoor room tone. (2) The male voice ceases speaking. The background piano music continues as the sole audio element, preserving the sentimental and serious mood of the piece. No sound effects or external noises are present during this interval. (3) A male and female voice speak the words '謝謝大家' in unison, exhibiting a polite and sincere tone with a natural falling intonation. The piano music persists underneath the voices and begins to fade out as the track concludes, ending the recording on a graceful, quiet note.
